script:
python3 -c "
import ast
F = '/home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py'
with open(F) as fh: src = fh.read()
tree = ast.parse(src)
lines = src.splitlines()
print('===== ALL function defs with line ranges =====')
fns = []
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.FunctionDef):
        fns.append((node.lineno, node.end_lineno, node.name))
fns.sort()
for s, e, n in fns:
    print(f'  L{s:>3}-{e:<3}: {n}')
print()
print('===== Function CONTAINING line 119 =====')
for s, e, n in fns:
    if s <= 119 <= e:
        print(f'  -> {n} (L{s}-{e})')
print()
print('===== globals()/setattr/exec/eval calls =====')
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Call):
        f = node.func
        nm = None
        if isinstance(f, ast.Name): nm = f.id
        elif isinstance(f, ast.Attribute): nm = f.attr
        if nm in ('globals','setattr','exec','eval'):
            print(f'  L{node.lineno}: {nm}()')
print()
print('===== Lines 90-130 (function around line 119) =====')
for i in range(89, min(130, len(lines))):
    print(f'  L{i+1:>3}: {lines[i]}')
"
